task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events. Include environment variables for the S3 bucket name, CloudWatch log group, and timeout settings.

required_elements: Environment.Variables with S3_BUCKET, LOG_GROUP, and TIMEOUT
validation_rules: FunctionName must be a non-empty string
Runtime must be a valid Lambda runtime (e.g., python3.11, nodejs18.x)
Timeout must be an integer between 1 and 900
Environment variables must be in key-value pairs
edge_cases: Handle empty or null environment variables

task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name against AWS naming rules. The function should accept a bucket name string and return True if valid, False otherwise.

validation_rules: Bucket name must be 3-63 characters long
Must start and end with lowercase letter or number
Can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
Cannot be formatted as an IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.1)
edge_cases: Bucket names at boundary lengths (3, 63 characters)
disallowed: External library dependencies beyond standard library

task: Create a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name where account-id is 12 digits and role-name contains alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.

required_elements: Match role name with allowed characters
validation_rules: Account ID must be exactly 12 digits
Role name must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
Role name must be at least 1 character long
edge_cases: Role names with multiple consecutive special characters
disallowed: Allowing role names with invalid characters (dots, spaces, special chars)
Accepting account IDs with incorrect digit count
